concerns.text: FR-002 requires support for four discrete prompt-size conditions (0k, 10k, 50k, 200k). While T013 mentions fetching subsets, there is no explicit task to implement the logic for selecting/sampling the specific 0k, 10k, 50k, and 200k subsets from the source dataset. T013 is generic ('fetch/download... subsets') and does not guarantee the implementation of the specific condition logic required by FR-002 and US-1.

FR-003 mandates the correctness reward be the 'sole reward signal'. T014 implements 'binary correctness reward', but T015 implements 'clipped-surrogate loss and KL-penalty'. The tasks do not explicitly address the contradiction in the spec (FR-003 vs FR-001/US-1) regarding the KL-penalty. If the KL-penalty is part of the loss function (not a reward signal), the task description should clarify this distinction to ensure the 'sole reward signal' constraint is met without omitting the KL-penalty required for PPO stability.

SC-005 requires running 3 independent seeds per prompt-size condition to verify reproducibility (CV < 0.05). While T032 mentions generating summary statistics, there is no explicit task to implement the orchestration logic for running the 3 seeds per condition and aggregating them for the CV calculation. T029 aggregates results, but the specific logic for the 3-seed loop and CV verification is missing.

Edge Case: 'missing teacher exemplars' requires the system to 'fall back to the correctness-only reward component and log the missing-exemplar rate'. T014 implements the reward, but no task explicitly covers the logic for detecting missing exemplars, falling back to correctness-only, and logging the rate. This is a specific acceptance scenario in US-1/Edge Cases not covered by a distinct task.

Edge Case: 'convergence failures (KL divergence > 0.5)' requires reducing learning rate and logging. T018 covers this. However, the Edge Case 'missing teacher exemplars' (see above) is not covered. Additionally, the Edge Case 'benchmark evaluation fails' (retry logic) is covered in T024, but the 'missing exemplars' fallback is missing.

T013 description: 'fetch/download OpenAssistant dataset subsets'. This is vague regarding the specific logic for the 0k condition (which implies no data or a specific empty buffer). The task should explicitly mention handling the 0k baseline condition to ensure FR-002 is fully covered.
